$comment: Release flow: `npm run release` bumps the version in BOTH package.json files (root via the npm plugin, release/app via @release-it/bumper — electron-builder and app.getVersion() read release/app), prepends the conventional-commits section to CHANGELOG.md, commits as chore(release), tags vX.Y.Z and pushes. Since 2026-07-13 the tag push triggers NO build — release builds were removed from this repo's CI (kiagent-core-package.yml deleted); the tag exists so consumers (alpha-cent core.lock) can pin it. Local unsigned builds: `npm run package:oss`.
